title: Luma 16x
description: A soft and cozy 16x pack with clean textures and relaxing vibes
body:
## 🎉 Introducing: Luma 16x – Your PvP Game-Changer!
Level up your Minecraft PvP experience with Luma 16x, a clean and cozy texture pack built for intense Bedwars showdowns, fireball fights, and fast-paced combat. Whether you're a casual player or a competitive warrior, this pack is made to give you clarity and comfort in every battle.

## 🌟 Pack Highlights
- **🔪 Refined Swords:** Slimmer, sleeker swords for better visibility and precision during PvP.
- **🌌 Custom Sky & UI:** A beautifully tailored sky paired with a fresh, minimal hotbar for a more immersive experience.
- **🛠️ Full Version Support:** Works smoothly from Minecraft 1.6.1 to 1.20.2, with 1.8.9 recommended for peak PvP performance.
- **✨ Shader Compatible:** Looks stunning with Optifine, Sodium, and shaders that keep textures intact.
- **⚔️ PvP-Tuned:** Designed with Hypixel Bedwars in mind—optimized for low latency and high focus gameplay.
- **💻 Lightweight & Efficient:** Built to run smoothly on all setups, keeping your game clean and responsive.

## ❓ FAQs: 
### Can I use shaders? 
- Yes! just avoid shaders that override or distort textures.

### Can I showcase it?
- Definitely! You're welcome to feature Verity 16x in videos or streams—just credit the pack and creators.

## 🎨 Credits
- [**ItsFlare**](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsFlxre) for Item creation, design, and Idea.
- **Tory** for the fireball texture.
- OxyMaybe for 2nd sky
